title: Small Talk at Work

segments.text: I finally got around to fixing my bike.
Did you go for a ride?
I went hiking with my family.
The leaves are starting to turn.
We should go before they fall.

transcript: Morning! How was your weekend? Pretty good, thanks. I finally got around to fixing my bike. Nice. Did you go for a ride? Just a short one. The weather was perfect. I went hiking with my family. Sounds lovely. Where did you go? Up to the lake. The leaves are starting to turn. We should go before they fall.
